message:
Fix flow envelope confidence to count only ablation trials, excluding statically-safe flows

Change FlowEnvelopeSynthesizer confidence interval computation so n_trials
counts only flows subjected to ablation (removable flows), and n_essential
counts only flows promoted by the oracle minus those already statically
required. Previously the confidence ratio included statically-safe flows
in the denominator, inflating apparent confidence. Update all affected
test expectations in flow_envelope, flow_envelope_edge_cases, and
flow_envelope_integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
